title: Maximum Enchantment Highlight
description: A Fabric mod that highlights the maximum enchants on an item.
body:
# MEH - Maximum Enchantment Hightlight MEH is a really simple mod that ***highlights*** enchantments that are max level and *beyond*.
![An image showing a depiction of a maximum enchanted diamond sword with the maximum level enchantments in gold and the enchantments that are above maximum in bold. The enchantments that are not maximum level are left to the standard gray.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e61cf0a5e5192677ceeb9199f1099e9cc0e5930.png) # SUPPORT ME (me and my friend) ON KO-FI! [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/G2G21KMGXH) **TODO:**
[ ] Highlight maximum book enchantments
[ ] Add configuration options to change the colors
